title: MS / MD Jobs 2026 – Teaching Faculty
applyMode: Offline – via prescribed application form sent by Speed Post/file:2
shortInfo: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 118 vacancies across India. Candidates with MS/MD Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 19-05-2026, and closes on 07-02-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through ESIC website, esic.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 118 Professors Posts
basic_details.application_mode: Offline – via prescribed application form sent by Speed Post/file:2
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 118 vacancies across India. Candidates with MS/MD Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 19-05-2026, and closes on 07-02-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through ESIC website, esic.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Application fee is payable via Demand Draft/Banker’s Cheque only, in favour of “ESI Fund Account No. 2” payable at Delhi.

age_limit.maximum_age: Not exceeding 50 years for Professor as on closing date of applications (27.07.2026 for most candidates).
age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 50 years for Professor as on closing date of applications (27.07.2026 for most candidates).
age_limit.details: Up to 5 years for ESIC / Government servants; 5 years for SC/ST; 3 years for OBC; 10 years for PwBD (with cumulative maximum as per rules); additional relaxations for Ex‑Servicemen as per Government orders.

qualification.education_qualification: A recognised medical qualification included in First or Second Schedule or Part‑II of Third Schedule to IMC Act 1956, fulfilling Section 13(3) conditions where applicable. Postgraduate qualification – MD/MS or equivalent in the concerned subject or allied discipline.
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree (Master’s) in concerned subject/allied discipline and a Doctorate degree (PhD) from a recognised University in the respective subject/allied discipline, as per MCI/NMC “Minimum Qualifications for Teachers in Medical Institutions Regulations”.

salary_details.salary: Pay Level‑13 in Pay Matrix (Rs. 1,23,100 – 2,15,900) plus Non‑Practicing Allowance (NPA) and other admissible allowances

how_to_apply: Download and print the official notification and Application Form for “Professor in ESI Corporation‑2026” from ESIC website or your job portal.

Fill the application form in BLOCK letters with accurate details such as specialty applied for, personal information, educational qualifications, teaching experience, registration details and publication list.
Prepare a Demand Draft/Banker’s Cheque of Rs. 500/- (if applicable) in favour of “ESI Fund Account No. 2”, payable at Delhi, issued after the date of advertisement.
Attach self‑attested copies of required documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, caste/EWS/PwBD certificates, proof of age, research publications, etc.) as per the checklist.
Affix a recent self‑attested passport size photograph in the space provided on the application form.
Place the filled and signed application form along with DD/Banker’s Cheque and enclosures in an envelope superscribed “Application for the post of Professor for Medical Institutions”.
Send the application preferably by Speed Post to the address given below so as to reach on or before 27.07.2026 (03.08.2026 for specified remote areas).
important_instructions: Eligibility (age, qualifications, experience etc.) is calculated with reference to the closing date of applications – 27.07.2026 for most candidates.
Mere submission of application or call for interview does not confer any right to appointment; candidature remains provisional until verification.
Incomplete/unsigned applications, or those not in prescribed proforma, without required documents, fee, or received after the last date will be rejected without communication.
Any false statement or suppression of material information can lead to cancellation of candidature/appointment at any stage.
Selected candidates will be on probation as per ESIC rules and are liable to be posted anywhere in India; state preferences are only indicative and not binding.

faq.question: What is ESIC Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ESIC Professor Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive by Employees' State Insurance Corporation under the Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India, to fill 118 Professor posts in various medical specialties across ESIC Post Graduate Institutes of Medical Sciences & Research (PGIMSRs) and ESIC Medical Colleges.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in ESIC Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 118 Professor vacancies are available across 22 medical specialties including General Medicine (8), General Surgery (8), Orthopedics (8), Transfusion Medicine (9), Anatomy (7), Anesthesiology (7), and others, distributed as UR-35, SC-25, ST-13, OBC-37, EWS-8, with 8 PwBD posts.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for ESIC Professor 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of offline applications is 27 July 2026 for all India candidates, and 03 August 2026 for candidates from remote areas (NE States, J&K Ladakh division, specified HP districts, Andaman & Nicobar, Lakshadweep).

faq.question: What is the eligibility for ESIC Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a recognized medical qualification (MBBS/equivalent) with MD/MS or equivalent in the concerned specialty, plus four years teaching experience as Reader/Associate Professor OR three years as Associate Professor with minimum four research publications (two as first author during Associate Professor tenure).

faq.question: What is the age limit for ESIC Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 50 years as on 27 July 2026 for UR/EWS candidates, with relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBD, and up to 5 years for ESIC/Government servants, subject to cumulative maximum limits.

faq.question: What is the selection process for ESIC Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Interview by ESIC Selection Board with possible shortlisting based on teaching experience beyond minimum requirement. Minimum qualifying marks: UR/EWS-50, OBC-45, SC/ST/PwBD-40 out of 100 marks.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for ESIC Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, application fee is ₹500 via Demand Draft/Banker's Cheque in favour of "ESI Fund Account No. 2" payable at Delhi, for General/OBC/EWS/ESIC male candidates. SC/ST/PwBD/Women/Ex-Servicemen are exempted from fee payment.

faq.question: What is the salary for ESIC Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Professors receive Pay Level-13 in the Pay Matrix (₹1,23,100 – ₹2,15,900) plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA), Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Transport Allowance and other admissible Central Government allowances.

seo_tags: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026
